review: The outdoor seating area is beautiful but valet parking took 25 minutes just to bring my car back. Total mood killer.
Foodpanda packaging was totally mangled. Mint margarita spilled everywhere inside the paper bag and made the fries soggy.
Light went out twice during our meeting but their generator backup kicked in within 5 seconds. AC stayed cold. Bohat zabardast service.
positive_points: fast generator response; cold ac; great service

review: Unbelievable value for the high-tea combo. So many items and everything tasted fresh. Highly recommended.
Even during the massive weekend rush, their valet team managed the parking so smoothly. No long queues on the main road.
positive_points: smooth parking management; no long queues

review: Clean modern interior and super fast wifi. Finished my office work from there peacefully. Lotus croissant was 10/10.
brand_attributes: clean modern interior; super fast wifi
positive_points: clean interior; fast wifi; peaceful atmosphere

review: No space to park anywhere near the café and the guards were entirely unhelpful. Had to leave without getting my order.
Lahore heat was unbearable today and their generator was making huge noise. AC wasn't cooling properly at all.
Came for the Sip and Paint event. The workshop itself was very fun but the café got so insanely crowded you couldn't even move your elbows.
They had a football screening indoors and it was blasting so loud we couldn't even talk. Left with a headache. Coffee was just okay.
The gluten free oat milk option costs an extra Rs. 500 and the portion size was tiny. Tasted rubbery.
Worst experience. Coffee was cold and foodpanda rider took 50 minutes to deliver. Not worth the money at all.
The pour-over coffee tasted fine but Rs. 1200 for a single cup is getting ridiculous. Cashier had a bad attitude too.
Found a hair in my butter croissant... gross. Appetite was completely gone. Manager did remove it from the bill but still bad experience.
positive_points: manager removed it from the bill

review: Hands down the best espresso and almond croissant in Lahore. The pastry was so flaky and crispy. Coming back every weekend for sure.
positive_points: best espresso; flaky and crispy pastry

review: The iced matcha was literally 90% ice and tasted like straight grass water. Total rip off for Rs. 850.
Really appreciated that they have a clean and proper prayer room inside. Very peaceful ambience for a family coffee evening.
brand_attributes: clean and proper prayer room; peaceful ambience
positive_points: clean and proper prayer room; peaceful ambience

review: Great coffee but finding parking here is an absolute nightmare. Spent 20 minutes circling the street just to get an americano.
Amazing live acoustic music on Friday night! The pour-over was perfectly brewed. The iced tea was amazing.
positive_points: amazing live acoustic music; perfectly brewed coffee

review: The crust of the lotus pastry was completely burnt to a crisp on the bottom. Tasted like charcoal. Disappointed.
Excellent specialty coffee selection. The pour-over has great fruity notes. Baristas really know their stuff.
positive_points: excellent specialty coffee selection; knowledgeable baristas

review: Attended their ceramic pottery workshop today. It was organized beautifully and they served great complementary iced lattes.
Best iced latte in town. They use high quality oat milk. Clean space and friendly faces.
positive_points: high quality oat milk; friendly faces

review: The specialty single-origin espresso shot was completely burnt and sour. For Rs. 950 this is completely unacceptable.
Always a solid experience. The classic hot chocolate is consistent and the whipped cream is perfectly sweet.
Sat there with my laptop for almost three hours. Staff didn't mind at all and the WiFi stayed solid. Best spanish latte in town.
Service was slow despite the place not being busy. Waited 45 mins for a single cold brew coffee and it was completely watered down.
Incredible service by Sarah tonight! Recommended the specialty cold brew flights and they were amazing. Very cozy lighting.
Super pet friendly place! Brought my cat and staff immediately got a bowl of water. Very accommodating.
Hosted a small family gathering here. Staff handled 10 of us flawlessly. Specialty coffee recommendations were great.
